title: VC firm futurepresent debuts with $300m AI fund - LinkedIn
search_path_label: A 级媒体 / GDELT 路径
full_text:
VC firm futurepresent debuts with $300m AI fund
This title was summarized by AI from the post below.
Seb Johnson 📊🇪🇺
Seb Johnson 📊🇪🇺 is an Influencer
2mo
Report this post
BREAKING: New VC futurepresent has come out of stealth with a debut fund of $300m to back AI companies!
The firm is focused on AI platforms and infrastructure across the US and Europe and has already made 14 investments.
It's deploying a barbell investing strategy that includes pre-seed/seed as well as concentrated growth investments. Investment to date include:
🚀 General Intuition
🚀 Skalar
🚀 Isidor
The partners are:
🔥 Thomas Lueke, former Partner at Cherry Ventures
🔥 Jan Rettel , former hedge fund manager investing in public tech
🔥 David Meiborg , former Partner at First Momentum Ventures
🔥 Johnson Yang , former Partner at General Catalyst
And Venture Partner Remy A. Lazarovici , who was employee #1 at Celonis.
147

Report this comment
Love seeing VCs double down on AI infrastructure and platforms. With partners like Thomas, Jan, David, Johnson, and Remy, the portfolio companies are in great hands — looking forward to seeing their impact on the ecosystem.
Like
Reply

Great news for everyone in the AI, Seb ... Oh, wait, that means everyone nowadays 🫠
Like

2mo
Report this comment
Exciting to see a $300M debut fund targeting AI infrastructure across both the US and Europe — the barbell strategy combining seed and concentrated growth bets is a smart way to capture both early upside and scaling winners. Watching futurepresent closely!

Venture capital is recovering, but not evenly.
In 2026, capital is concentrating in late‑stage AI and deep tech, deal structures are more complex and investor expectations are rising fast.
In our latest insight, Fellini Si, Hoan Nguyen and Mark Grenyer explore what this selective rebound means for fund managers, the operational challenges to prepare for and how the right fund administration model can help you scale with confidence across Europe and Asia.

## full_text

VC firm futurepresent debuts with $300m AI fund
This title was summarized by AI from the post below.
Seb Johnson 📊🇪🇺
Seb Johnson 📊🇪🇺 is an Influencer
2mo
Report this post
BREAKING: New VC futurepresent has come out of stealth with a debut fund of $300m to back AI companies!
The firm is focused on AI platforms and infrastructure across the US and Europe and has already made 14 investments.
It's deploying a barbell investing strategy that includes pre-seed/seed as well as concentrated growth investments. Investment to date include:
🚀 General Intuition
🚀 Skalar
🚀 Isidor
The partners are:
🔥 Thomas Lueke, former Partner at Cherry Ventures
🔥 Jan Rettel , former hedge fund manager investing in public tech
🔥 David Meiborg , former Partner at First Momentum Ventures
🔥 Johnson Yang , former Partner at General Catalyst
And Venture Partner Remy A. Lazarovici , who was employee #1 at Celonis.
